title: About Natalie Zimmermann – Boxing World Champion, Mental Coach & Personal Trainer in Hamburg

intro.0: Natalie Zimmermann is a WIBF and WBF boxing world champion, physical therapist, personal trainer, mental coach, and speaker in Hamburg-Harvestehude—head of the Body & Mind Studio at Rothenbaumchaussee 156.
intro.1: Professional boxing world champion (WIBF 2023/2024, WBF 2024), physical therapist, personal trainer, mental coach, and speaker—from Hamburg-Harvestehude to clients across Germany.

career.0: Since age 20, I have been a competitive athlete and turned my passion into my profession. With nearly 20 years of experience, I now work as a physical therapist, personal fitness trainer, and mental coach—with my own studio, Body & Mind, at Rothenbaumchaussee 156 in Hamburg-Harvestehude.
career.1: In my mid-30s, I fulfilled my dream and stepped into professional boxing. In 2023, I became world champion—a milestone that shows it's never too late to believe in yourself and achieve big goals.

awards.6: Fascia expert and Lu Jong yoga instructor
awards.7: Over 22 years of experience in martial arts

philosophy.0: My approach is holistic: body, mind, and lifestyle are interconnected. True strength emerges when physical training, mental resilience, and a clear inner stance come together. That is where my coaching begins.
philosophy.1: Whether personal training, mental coaching, boxing, or speaking—I want to inspire people to leave their comfort zone, release their blocks, and bring out their best.

servicesHeading: Services at the Body & Mind Studio Hamburg

services.0: Personal training in Hamburg—individually planned for every fitness level.
services.1: Mental coaching & Wingwave—more focus, less stress, clear goals.
services.2: Boxing & kickboxing—technique, conditioning, and mental strength.
services.3: Physical therapy & manual therapy—therapy at elite sport level.
services.4: Lu Jong yoga & fascia training—mobility, breathing, regeneration.
services.5: Speaker and brand ambassador engagements—authentic, motivating, impactful.

location.0: You can find me at the Body & Mind Studio, Rothenbaumchaussee 156, 20149 Hamburg. I offer online coaching throughout Germany.
